packetPreviewSections.scope: current-user only; default-user, offline-image, and machine claims are outside this packet preview.
packetPreviewSections.target-identity-redaction: Target identity is redacted as <redacted-current-user>; no local profile path or private share is present.
packetPreviewSections.evidence-boundary: Evidence is dry-run, mock, checklist, and report-only material. It is not real UX evidence and is not approval.
packetPreviewSections.approval-checklist-summary: Approval checklist ergonomics is readable and remains separate from any authorization review state.
packetPreviewSections.negative-blocker-summary: Negative review blockers are summarized: scope drift, private path, evidence promotion, wording drift, rollback gap, and runner gate gap.
packetPreviewSections.rollback-or-restore-plan: Restore notes name the original templates, preview report artifact, manual reviewer, and separate future authorization path.
packetPreviewSections.execution-boundary: Preview does not approve authorization or execution and cannot perform true UX restore.
packetPreviewSections.runner-gate-reminder: Reusable current runner is acceptable for report-only validation; any expanded runner or workflow change needs separate confirmation.

fieldMap: scope -> authorization request and scope guard
evidence-boundary -> dry-run, mock, negative review, and approval checklist reports
